zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Vialls於1600年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾洛維爾時，他的父親John Vylles30歲，母親Elizabeth Litchfield30歲。他於1625年8月4日與Margaret Cooper在英國諾薩普頓史爾洛維爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾藍波特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Vialls于1600年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾洛維爾时，他的父亲John Vylles30岁，母亲Elizabeth Litchfield30岁。他于1625年8月4日与Margaret Cooper在英国諾薩普頓史爾洛維爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾藍波特。

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Vialls was born in 1600, in Rothwell, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Vylles, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Litchfield, was 30. He married Margaret Cooper on 4 August 1625, in Rothwell, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in his hometown, and was buried in Lamport, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Vialls est né en 1600, à Rothwell, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Vylles, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Litchfield, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Cooper le 4 août 1625, à Rothwell, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Lamport, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Vialls 1600 in Rothwell, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Vylles 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Litchfield 30. Er hat am 4. August 1625 in Rothwell, Northamptonshire, England Margaret Cooper geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lamport, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Cooper il 4 agosto 1625, nel Rothwell, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Lamport, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Viallsが1600年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアロスウエルで生まれた時，父John Vyllesは30歳，母Elizabeth Litchfieldは30歳であった。1625年8月4日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアロスウエルでMargaret Cooperと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアランプオルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Vialls(이)가 1600년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 로스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Vylles(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Litchfield(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1625년 8월 4일 영국 노르섬프토실르 로스웰에서 Margaret Cooper(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 램포트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Vialls nasceu em 1600, em Rothwell, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Vylles, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Litchfield, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Cooper em 4 de agosto de 1625, em Rothwell, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Lamport, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Vialls родился в 1600 г. в местности ротвелл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Vylles было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Litchfield, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Cooper 4 августа 1625 г. в местности ротвелл, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности лэмпорт, нортамптоншир, Англия.

Se casó con Margaret Cooper el 4 de agosto de 1625, en Rothwell, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Lamport, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
